overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a player navigating a dense neon-lit cyberpunk city at night. The clip progresses from an indoor plaza with a brief combat encounter, through covered walkways and staircases, culminating at a busy multi-lane street with heavy traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial plaza with ATM kiosks and digital billboards

events.description: heavily armored character in red suit emerges from behind cover and engages in combat
camera turns sharply left and moves away from combat area toward corridor exit

agents.ego_description: engaging in close-quarters combat with an armored opponent in a neon-lit plaza, then disengaging and moving toward an exit

notable_agents.action: heavily armored character in red and green suit firing a weapon from behind a sofa

entered.detail: row of pink-lit ATM kiosks against the back wall
artificial palm tree with neon lighting near the seating area
massive illuminated screen displaying a face advertisement on the upper wall
modern sofa used as cover by the combatant
scattered litter and debris on the concrete floor
illuminated advertisement sign for Nicola beverage brand

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered commercial plaza with pink neon lighting. ATM machines and digital billboards line the walls. At 3 seconds, a heavily armored character in red emerges and fires a weapon, initiating combat. The player character quickly disengages, turning left toward a corridor exit, passing trash debris and illuminated advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian corridor with structural columns and food vendors

events.description: exits indoor plaza into narrow corridor with large blue structural column
begins ascending wide concrete stairs toward upper level

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow corridor with blue structural columns, passing a food stall vendor and approaching a staircase

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind a lit food stall with striped awning

entered.detail: massive cylindrical blue column supporting the overhead structure
small vendor stall with striped awning and neon lighting
large vertical neon sign with pink lettering reading EL GUAPO
wide staircase with red railings leading to upper level
double metal doors with diagonal bracing and pink neon overhead lighting

segments.scene_description: The player exits the plaza into a narrow corridor dominated by a massive blue structural column. A food vendor stands at a lit stall to the right. The camera passes the 'EL GUAPO' neon sign and approaches a wide concrete staircase with red railings, beginning the ascent around the 15-second mark.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with neon signage and food carts

events.description: ascending concrete stairs with yellow railings toward upper walkway
reaches top of stairs and enters elevated pedestrian walkway with city views

agents.ego_description: climbing stairs to an elevated walkway and proceeding along the upper level past neon signs and food vendors

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking past a food cart on the upper walkway

entered.detail: bright yellow safety railings along the staircase and walkway edge
red neon sign for Fuyutsuki establishment on distant building
elevated concrete pedestrian path with overhead passageways
mobile food vendor cart with umbrella on the walkway
large illuminated arrow sign with green neon lighting pointing directionally
row of automated vending kiosks against the building wall

segments.scene_description: The player ascends the concrete stairs with yellow railings, passing the Fuyutsuki sign. Upon reaching the upper walkway at 26 seconds, the scene opens to an elevated pedestrian path lined with neon billboards. A food cart sits on the walkway as the camera proceeds past vending machines and a large green neon arrow sign.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy multi-lane urban street with heavy vehicle traffic and neon storefronts

events.description: descending stairs from upper walkway to street level
emerges onto busy multi-lane street with heavy traffic and neon-lit buildings
navigating along sidewalk as multiple vehicles pass by on the road

agents.ego_description: descending to street level and walking along a busy urban road with heavy neon-lit traffic and towering billboards

notable_agents.action: blue sports car and other vehicles driving along the multi-lane street

entered.detail: bright red neon sign for Red Shack establishment
illuminated sign for Cornacasa business with red lettering
green neon sign for California Express with circular logo
black and yellow bollards separating sidewalk from street traffic
elevated highway or monorail track crossing overhead

segments.scene_description: The player descends from the upper walkway to a busy street level, transitioning to a wide-open urban environment. The scene features heavy traffic with multiple lanes of cars passing by, including a distinctive blue sports car. Neon signs for Red Shack, Cornacasa, and California Express illuminate the street, while traffic barriers line the sidewalk. The camera moves along the street under an overpass structure, surrounded by towering buildings covered in digital billboards.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic, neon-lit commercial plaza into the sprawling expanse of a busy metropolitan thoroughfare. It begins within a pink-hued plaza lined with ATMs and digital billboards, where a sudden skirmish with an armored combatant forces a quick retreat through a corridor of trash and advertisements. As the camera exits the plaza, the environment shifts into a narrow passage dominated by a massive blue column and a food stall before ascending a wide concrete staircase with red and yellow railings. The scene then opens onto an elevated pedestrian walkway filled with vending machines and green neon signage, providing a brief vantage point over the city. Finally, the camera descends from the walkway to a wide-open street level, transitioning into a high-traffic urban canyon featuring speeding sports cars and towering digital billboards under a massive overpass.
